---
title: "Welcome!"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/Bio_pic.JPG){width=200px}
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {style="text-align:center"}
<h3>My name is Jenna Baljunas, and I study community ecology!</h3>
\
Currently, I am a PhD student in the [Spatial and Community Ecology (SpaCE) Lab](https://www.communityecologylab.com/) at Michigan State University and a part of the [Department of Integrative Biology](https://integrativebiology.natsci.msu.edu/) and [Ecology, Evolution, and Behavior program](https://eeb.msu.edu/).

<div class="image-row">

  <a href="https://integrativebiology.natsci.msu.edu/" target="_blank">
    <img src="images/IBIO_logo.png" width="100">
  </a>

  <a href="https://eeb.msu.edu/" target="_blank">
    <img src="images/EEB_logo.jpg" width="100">
  </a>

</div>
:::
:::
::::

<div>

::: {style="text-align:center"}
<h3>Particularly, I am interested in how communities change in response to environmental change.</h3>
\
My dissertation research focuses on the effects of climate change on tropical communities. 
:::
